data.name: Your Fox Wife
data.detailed_description:
Your Fox Wife is a simple desktop pet game featuring an adorable fox companion living on your screen. Drag her freely, watch her interact with your cursor, and enjoy heartwarming moments through delightful animations.

Game Features:

• Interactive Reactions:

  – Pat her head to make her happy

  – Tap her chest to see shy, blushing reactions

  – Interact with her outfit and thighs to make her blush even more

• Idle Behaviors:

  – Watch her dance, chill, or follow your cursor

• Drag & Position:

  – Move her freely anywhere on your desktop

• Custom Scaling:

  – Enlarge or shrink her (click and hold LMB, then scroll the mouse wheel)

• Living Companion:

  – Her eyes track your mouse movements

data.short_description: Brighten your desktop with Your Fox Wife! Drag this adorable companion anywhere on your screen and watch her bring your workspace to life.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: i5
  • 記憶體: 400 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics 4400
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
